field.title: CPL
field.formula:
IF SUM([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    [USD + TAX] / SUM([is_lead])
END

field.title: Брони
field.formula:
IF sum([booking_event]) > 0 THEN
    sum([booking_event])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([booking_event_kkbp]) > 0 THEN
    sum([booking_event_kkbp])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: Не лиды
field.formula:
IF sum([not_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([not_lead])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([not_lead_c1ez]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([not_lead_c1ez])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: % не лидов
field.formula:
IF SUM([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([not_lead]) / SUM([is_lead])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([is_lead_vzab]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([not_lead_c1ez]) / SUM([is_lead_vzab])
END

field.title: CRL
field.formula:
IF SUM(MAX([clicks] FIXED [event_date], [adset_id])) > 0 AND SUM([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([is_lead]) / SUM(MAX([clicks] FIXED [event_date], [adset_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(MAX([clicks_p2u6] FIXED [event_date_r5hl], [adset_id_ni6u])) > 0 AND SUM([is_lead_vzab]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([is_lead_vzab]) / SUM(MAX([clicks_p2u6] FIXED [event_date_r5hl], [adset_id_ni6u]))
END

field.title: CRQ
field.formula:
IF sum([qual]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / SUM([is_lead])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([qual_kx7w]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead_vzab]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_kx7w]) / SUM([is_lead_vzab])
END

field.title: visible
field.formula:
IF [campaign_id] IS NOT NULL THEN
    TRUE
ELSE
    FALSE
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [campaign_id_ql1s] IS NOT NULL THEN
    TRUE
ELSE
    FALSE
END

field.title: CRC
field.formula:
IF sum([contact_in]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([contact_in]) / SUM([is_lead])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([contact_in_2xrk]) > 0 AND sum([is_lead_vzab]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([contact_in_2xrk]) / SUM([is_lead_vzab])
END

field.title: CPCo
field.formula:
IF SUM([contact_in]) > 0 THEN
   [USD + TAX] / SUM([contact_in])
END

field.title: Показы
field.formula:
IF SUM(MAX([total_video_impressions] FIXED [event_date], [campaign_id], [adset_id], [ad_id])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([total_video_impressions] FIXED [event_date], [campaign_id], [adset_id], [ad_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(MAX([total_video_impressions_y4i7] FIXED [event_date_r5hl], [campaign_id_ql1s], [adset_id_ni6u], [ad_id_p683])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([total_video_impressions_y4i7] FIXED [event_date_r5hl], [campaign_id_ql1s], [adset_id_ni6u], [ad_id_p683]))
END

END

END

field.title: Thruplay

END

field.title: Averege Play Time (сек.)

END
